raw_consumer_statement: A complete description is included in the cover sheet of my supporting documentation I have attached. In summary, I went to XXXX in XX/XX/year> and my friend and I took a cab 1 mile to a rental car company. We were left at the wrong destination. The cab driver grossly inflated the fare to {$77.00} in pesos. Then they charged my card twice for the same criminal rate. I disputed the charges. The card company told me it was obviously wrong and would address it. They then charged me and paid the fraudster. I called multiple times. Multiple times they said it was obviously wrong and would correct it then always send a letter in the snail mail saying they won't and paid the double charge to the criminals. The supporting documentation the cab driver provided wasn't even for the correct service, date, or amount. They sent a receipt for $ XXXX in furniture. The card company didn't even read it or question it. They are clearly rubber stamping fraudulent charges from vendors and sticking customers.
